Python Automation Workshop

Beginner-friendly workshop for students

Python Automation Workshop

Learn practical Python automation through hands-on projects, bite-sized lessons, and an interactive browser playground.

Start LearningView Schedule

Duration

5 Days

Mode

Online

Session

1 Hour / Day

Live demo

Build a project every day

From file automation to email bots—each lesson includes a practical mini project.

Day 1

Python Basics for Automation

Variables, loops, functions, file handling, and a file organizer project.

Day 2

CSV & Excel Automation

Automate spreadsheets using pandas and openpyxl for attendance and marks.

Workshop Snapshot

What you will build and learn in five days.

🧠

Hands-on lessons

Short, practical modules with real automation examples and exercises.

🚀

Beginner-friendly flow

No assumptions. Each day builds on what you just practiced.

💻

Browser-based Python

Run code live in the browser with a ready-to-use playground.

📁

Project-ready output

Download guides, access assignments, and share your GitHub work.

Interactive Playground

Run Python code right inside your browser.

Python Playground

Run examples instantly

Edit the code, press run, and inspect output immediately. Great for testing automation ideas without installing anything.

Output console

Ready to run Python code.

Featured Projects

Automation ideas to inspire your final build.

Easyos, pathlib

Auto File Organizer

Sort documents, images, and downloads automatically into folders.

coming soon
Easypandas, openpyxl

Attendance System

Track student attendance and generate reports from classroom data.

coming soon
Easyrequests, BeautifulSoup

News Scraper

Collect headlines from web pages and build a quick daily digest.

coming soon
Easysmtplib, schedule

Email Bot

Send scheduled email notifications and status updates automatically.

coming soon
EasyPillow, reportlab

Certificate Generator

Create certificates from templates and student data automatically.

coming soon

Resources

Helpful guides and tools for every step.

Python installation guide

Install Python, set up PATH, and confirm your environment quickly.

Open resource →

VS Code setup

Configure VS Code with Python extensions, code runner, and syntax helpers.

Open resource →

Key automation libraries

pandas, requests, BeautifulSoup, openpyxl, smtplib, schedule.

GitHub basics

Learn how to commit, push, and share your project repository.
